race.comment: PELEUS (5) first run for the Beer & Carpenter yard when he broke through for a dominant Maiden win over 1100m at Hawkesbury in a decent rating contest. Confidence is high and can surprise again in this stronger contest. CHICAMA (1) resumes from a lengthy break and comes back a gelding. Bumped into some progressive types last time in and looks ready to go with the two sharp trials. Blinkers come off and expected to go close. DIVO (2) resumes after having mixed luck last prep. Primed with the two trials and will appreciate the in-form Keatings' 3kg claim. Value player. MISS CAPITALE (9) finished second at Newcastle two runs back, then held up along the inside when sixth over 1200m at Wyong. Minor contender from the draw.
